recommendations.title: The Interview
recommendations.overview: A duel between a suspected murderer and a detective pressed by people who want results. But whose skin is really wanted?

recommendations.title: The Canal
recommendations.overview: A man who suspects his wife is cheating on him begins having nightmarish visions of an evil presence that he believes inhabits his house.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Detective Conan: Captured in Her Eyes

recommendations.title: Te3n
recommendations.overview: A grandfather, police officer and a priest join hands to investigate and find a missing child.

recommendations.title: Blood and Money
recommendations.overview: A retired veteran hunting in the Allagash backcountry of Maine discovers a dead woman with a duffle bag full of money. He soon finds himself in a web of deceit and murder.

recommendations.title: The Hunters
recommendations.overview: A policeman from Stockholm come to Norrbotten in Sweden, to join his brother, now when their father is dead. While there he starts to work on a long-running case where reindeers have been poached and soon discovers that his brother is involved...

recommendations.title: Ittefaq

recommendations.title: Dressed to Kill
recommendations.overview: After witnessing a mysterious woman brutally slay a homemaker, prostitute Liz Blake finds herself trapped in a dangerous situation. While the police thinks she is the murderer, the real killer is intent on silencing her only witness.
